items.title: After Him — English & Spanish Editions
items.excerpt: A 56-page guide for the after of a breakup: nervous system, attachment, and the slow science of letting go. Aya Books Issue 01 is now available in English and Spanish.

items.title: Aya — Calm Ritual Kit
items.excerpt: A quiet space you can return to. 5 rituals, 20 aesthetic wallpapers, and ambient video loops designed to bring calm, softness, and emotional reset into your everyday life.

items.title: Aya — Summer Dream by the Sea
items.excerpt: A sunlit chapter from Aya Seasons — where summer arrives as sea air, golden courts, garden shade, and the quiet confidence of a woman glowing in her own time.
